seoTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mount Royal and Mount Saint Thomas. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mount Royal and Mount Saint Thomas.
heading: Mount Royal vs Mount Saint Thomas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mount Royal, New South Wales and Mount Saint Thomas, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mount Saint Thomas has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Mount Royal (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mount Royal or Mount Saint Thomas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mount Royal has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Mount Saint Thomas scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mount Royal scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Mount Saint Thomas scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mount Royal or Mount Saint Thomas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mount Saint Thomas has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
